---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: [enhancement]
---

## Describe the Feature

What would you like to see added or improved?

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Implementation ideas

Any suggestions on how to implement this feature?
---
name: ✨ Feature Request
description: Suggest a new feature for KisanAI
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## ✨ Describe the Feature

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🤔 Motivation

Why do you need this feature? What problem does it solve?

### Is This Related to a Problem?

Describe the problem you're trying to solve. For example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## 💡 Proposed Solution

Describe how you would like this feature to work.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Have you considered other solutions or features that might solve this problem?

## 📚 Additional Context

Add any other context, examples, or screenshots here.

## 👥 Impact

Who would benefit from this feature?
- [ ] Farmers
- [ ] Developers
- [ ] Contributors
- [ ] All users

## 📊 Priority

How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Must have
- [ ] Should have
- [ ] Nice to have

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing feature requests
- [ ] This is not a duplicate
- [ ] I've described the problem clearly
- [ ] I've proposed a clear solution
- [ ] I've considered alternatives

---

**Tips for good feature requests:**
- Include use cases
- Explain the benefit
- Consider user experience
- Think about scalability
- Reference related features
